messages.message: 'scrollYProgress' is assigned a value but never used.

source:
"use client"; import { ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Scale, Shield, Users, FileText } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { motion, useScroll, useTransform } from "framer-motion"; import FloatingCard from "@/components/ui/FloatingCard"; export default function Home() { const { scrollYProgress } = useScroll(); const features = [ { title: "Crowd-Sourced Justice", description: "Gather thousands of signatures to give weight to your cause before legal submission.", icon: , }, { title: "Pre-Filing Review", description: "Our automated legal engine checks your draft for relevance and formatting.", icon: , }, { title: "Secure & transparent", description: "End-to-end encryption ensures your data and identity remain protected.", icon: , }, { title: "Legal Formatting", description: "Automatically generate court-ready PDFs from your drafted content.", icon: , }, ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}
{/* Text Content */}
v2.0 Beta Live

Justice
Defies Gravity

Elevate local issues to national attention. Draft, validate, and gather support for Public Interest Litigations with the power of technology and community.

Draft a PIL How it Works
{[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => (
{String.fromCharCode(64 + i)}
))}
Joined by 10,000+ citizens today
{/* Premium CSS-based Justice Orb Visual */}
{/* Outer Glows */}
{/* The Justice Orb */}
{/* Internal Orbits */}
{/* Floating Icons representing components of justice */} {/* Geometric Accents */}
{/* Stats Cards floating around */}
4.2k PILs Filed
Digital Courts Ready
{/* Features Grid with Floating Cards */}

Power to the People

Advanced tools usually reserved for top law firms, now in your hands.
{features.map((feature, idx) => (
{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* Trust Section */}

Judicial Trust

Aligned with e-Courts Standards

{["Constitutional Reference Check", "Jurisdiction Compatibility", "Pre-submission formatting"].map((item, i) => (
{item}
))}

Make Your Case
Undeniable

A PIL with 10,000 signatures and system-verified citations is harder to ignore. We provide the infrastructure to turn local grievances into legal movements.

); }
